# Small stalls_per_face so cross driving aisles land visibly within
# the lot. Under the abstract-grid stamp, every integer y is a cross
# driving aisle regardless of the col_spacing >= row_spacing check.

polygon outer
0,0
300,0
300,250
0,250
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

set stalls_per_face=4
----
set stalls_per_face=4

debug use_abstract_stamp=true
----
debug use_abstract_stamp=true

generate
----
total_stalls: 128

screenshot
----
